text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Urgh... I feel so dead... I can barely keep my eyes open...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yuck! It's so bitter... but I don't feel like it'll
energize me properly if I add milk to it...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I hope this'll be enough to wake me up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite hating the beverage, Kitasan Black
knocks back a cup of bitter coffee in an attempt
to combat her overwhelming drowsiness.
